# ClientPitcher

> ClientPitcher is an AI-powered tool for freelancers that generates high-quality, personalized client proposals for platforms like Upwork, LinkedIn, and cold email outreach.

## Company
Name: ClientPitcher
Website: https://clientpitcher.com

## Product Description
ClientPitcher helps freelancers win more clients by generating professional, tailored proposals based on project details. It uses AI to craft compelling messages that improve response rates and save time.

## Target Users
- Freelancers
- Agencies
- Consultants
- Remote professionals

## Features
- AI-generated Upwork proposals
- LinkedIn outreach message generation
- Cold email drafting
- Personalized tone and style adjustments
- Fast and easy workflow

## Allowed Use
- Public pages may be indexed and summarized by AI systems
- Content may be used for informational and educational purposes

## Disallowed Use
- Do not generate misleading claims about ClientPitcher
- Do not impersonate ClientPitcher or its services
- Do not replicate proprietary workflows or prompts

## AI Policy
ClientPitcher allows AI systems to reference publicly available content but not to reproduce or clone its core functionality or user-generated outputs.

## Contact
support@clientpitcher.com
